infrastructure.name: Jaipur Southern Ring Road
infrastructure.desc: Connecting Ajmer, Tonk, and Agra roads.

infrastructure.name: Jagatpura Metro Extension
infrastructure.desc: Phase 2 Metro connecting Sitapura to Ambabari.

infrastructure.name: Northern Ring Road
infrastructure.desc: Connecting Delhi Road to Agra Road.

ai_report.infra: Metro Phase 2 (Announced - DPR Submitted, expected 2028) is 800m away. Bombay Hospital (Operational) is 1.5km away.
ai_report.civilization: Highly Habitable. Top-tier schools (Jayshree Periwal, SRN) and JNU University within 2km radius. Zomato/Swiggy/Blinkit fully serviceable.
ai_report.utilities: Bisalpur Water Line: CONNECTED. JDA Sewerage: CONNECTED. Roads: 60ft wide tar roads.
ai_report.catalysts: The influx of IT professionals from nearby Sitapura and students requires high-quality rental housing. Metro approval will trigger a sudden 15% spike.
ai_report.recommendation: STRONG BUY FOR RESIDENTIAL / CO-LIVING. Build a multi-story PG or premium apartments. The immediate rental yield (approx 4-5%) mitigates holding risk.

ai_report.infra: Sector road widening (Started - 70% complete). Signal-free corridor planned.
ai_report.civilization: Dense upper-middle-class urban civilization. High footfall area.
ai_report.utilities: All civic utilities fully functional. 3-Phase commercial electricity available.
ai_report.catalysts: Mahal road is becoming the 'High Street' of South Jaipur. Retail brands (Reliance, Croma) are actively acquiring leases.
ai_report.recommendation: BUY FOR RETAIL COMMERCIAL. Excellent for building a retail complex or banking hub. High capital requirement but secure, inflation-beating asset.

listings.title: 2 Bigha Agri Land, Shivdaspura
listings.desc: Agricultural land 1.5km from proposed Aero City.

ai_report.infra: Aero City (Announced - Land Acquisition lapsed). Southern Ring Road (Operational - 3km away).
ai_report.civilization: Rural/Sparse. Nearest hospital (Mahatma Gandhi) is 12km away. No modern schools nearby.
ai_report.utilities: Bisalpur Water: NO (Borewell dependent, water table dropping). Sewerage: NO (Septic required). Roads: Dirt track (Kaccha rasta).
ai_report.catalysts: Revival of the Aero City project or construction of Ring Road service lanes into logistics parks. Timeline is highly uncertain (5-8 years).
ai_report.recommendation: HIGH RISK SPECULATIVE HOLD. DO NOT buy for residential use. Best suited for land-banking by NRIs who can lock capital away for 10+ years without needing immediate returns.

listings.title: 1000 sq.yd Warehousing Plot, Tonk Road Ext
listings.desc: Just off the Ring Road intersection.

ai_report.civilization: Industrial/Transit. Dhabas, truck stops, and petrol pumps.
ai_report.utilities: Water: Tanker/Borewell. Sewerage: None. Roads: 100ft sector road direct to highway.
ai_report.catalysts: E-commerce boom. Amazon and Flipkart are aggressively looking for last-mile fulfillment centers near the Ring Road to bypass city traffic.
ai_report.recommendation: BUY FOR WAREHOUSING. Construct a pre-engineered building (PEB) warehouse. Yields for logistics real estate here are beating traditional commercial.

ai_report.infra: Delhi-Mumbai Expressway Link Road (Close to completion - 90%). Mahindra SEZ (Operational).
ai_report.civilization: Developing suburban. Good basic schools. Super-specialty hospitals are a 15-min drive to Mansarovar.
ai_report.utilities: Bisalpur Water: Partially connected (subject to pressure). Sewerage: Society STP. Roads: Paved.
ai_report.catalysts: Completion of the Expressway link will drastically cut travel time to Gurgaon/Delhi, making this a prime second-home location for NCR residents.
ai_report.recommendation: BUY FOR END-USE OR RENTAL. Safe, stable investment. Good for young professionals working in Mahindra SEZ looking to build their first home.

listings.title: 400 sq.yd Residential, Near DPS Ajmer Road
listings.desc: Prime JDA plot near Delhi Public School.

ai_report.civilization: Highly established. DPS, St. Xaviers nearby. excellent family ecosystem.
ai_report.utilities: Water: Yes. Sewerage: Yes. Elect: Underground cables.
ai_report.catalysts: Scarcity of large plots in prime Ajmer road sectors. Wealth shifts from older crowded city areas to these open suburbs.
ai_report.recommendation: BUY FOR PREMIUM VILLA. Low risk. Not a hyper-growth speculative asset, but a wealth-preservation asset with excellent quality of life.

ai_report.infra: Sikar Road Metro (Proposed - No DPR yet).
ai_report.civilization: Pure Industrial. Heavy traffic, high pollution, labor colonies nearby.
ai_report.utilities: Water: Industrial Supply. Power: Dedicated RIICO sub-station (No cuts).
ai_report.catalysts: Shortage of new industrial land in city limits. Existing factories are expanding vertically.
ai_report.recommendation: BUY FOR MANUFACTURING / LEASING. Excellent rental yield from local MSMEs. Do not expect massive capital appreciation, focus on cash flow.

ai_report.civilization: Fringe urban. Basic local clinics. No major hospitals nearby.
ai_report.utilities: Water: Borewell only. Sewerage: None. Roads: Unpaved.
ai_report.catalysts: Expansion of VKI industrial labor looking for affordable housing. Long-term play on Northern Ring road completion.
ai_report.recommendation: HOLD / CAUTION. Low entry price but development is extremely slow here. Better suited for local blue-collar workers than NRI investors.

ai_report.infra: Agra Road Tunnel (Announced - Stuck in Eco-clearance).
ai_report.civilization: Sparse. Eco-sensitive zone nearby. Very peaceful but isolated.
ai_report.utilities: Off-grid primarily. Groundwater levels are decent.
ai_report.catalysts: Surge in Jaipur heritage tourism. Weekend getaway resorts are highly profitable.
ai_report.recommendation: BUY FOR HOSPITALITY. Convert to an eco-resort or wedding garden. Not suitable for standard residential plotting due to eco-zone restrictions (JDA Master Plan).

ai_report.civilization: Highly dense, slightly chaotic due to heavy transport vehicles.
ai_report.utilities: All civic amenities present but strained. Heavy traffic.
ai_report.catalysts: Metro completion will ease traffic and gentrify the area.
ai_report.recommendation: MIXED USE. Ground floor commercial (auto-parts/logistics), upper floors residential. High immediate utility.

ai_report.civilization: Peak urban. Top hospitals (Saket, Apex), massive central park, malls.
ai_report.catalysts: In-fill development. Builders are buying old houses, demolishing them, and building 4-story luxury builder floors (Stilt + 4).
ai_report.recommendation: BUY FOR REDEVELOPMENT. Excellent for an NRI wanting to partner with a local builder. Build 4 flats, keep 1, sell 3. High capital required, near-zero risk.

ai_report.catalysts: High density of coaching institutes and hospitals in the vicinity drives constant footfall.
ai_report.recommendation: BUY FOR RENTAL YIELD. Capital appreciation will be slow as it's already priced at market peak, but rental income is guaranteed and stable.

ai_report.civilization: Rapidly urbanizing. Good local markets, 10 mins from Vaishali Nagar.
ai_report.utilities: Bisalpur: Under laying phase. Sewerage: Work in progress.
ai_report.catalysts: Spillover demand from Vaishali Nagar. People who can't afford Vaishali are moving here.
ai_report.recommendation: STRONG BUY RESIDENTIAL. One of the best mid-budget residential plays in Jaipur right now. Infrastructure is catching up fast.

ai_report.civilization: Mid-tier residential. Narrower roads but good connectivity.
ai_report.utilities: Basic utilities present. Traffic bottlenecks exist.
ai_report.catalysts: Railway station upgrade to a satellite terminus will boost local commercial values.
ai_report.recommendation: BUY FOR BUDGET END-USE. Good for families relying on train transport.

ai_report.utilities: No JDA utilities. Private borewell required.
ai_report.catalysts: Expanding city borders. Slow but steady conversion of agri land to residential townships.
ai_report.recommendation: HOLD / LIFESTYLE BUY. Buy if you want a weekend home. Do not buy expecting rapid commercial or residential appreciation in the near term.
